title: Senior Software Engineer, Platform
content:
About the role:

We are looking for a Senior Software Engineer to join our Platform team. You will own backend services in TypeScript and Go, working closely with infrastructure.

Requirements:

  • 5+ years of backend engineering experience
  • Strong TypeScript and Node.js skills
  • Experience with PostgreSQL and Redis
  • Experience deploying to AWS or GCP

Nice to have:

  • Go experience
  • Kubernetes

Location: San Francisco, CA (Hybrid, 3 days in office)

Compensation: $180,000 - $230,000 USD base salary, plus equity
